info.description: Mobile API for EduGo - materials, assessments, progress, screens and statistics
info.title: EduGo API Mobile

get.summary: List assessments for the teacher's school
Get assessment detail with questions

delete.summary: Delete an assessment (draft only, soft delete)

get.summary: Get all questions for an assessment

post.summary: Add a question to an assessment

get.summary: Get result of an assessment attempt
List pending guardian relation requests for a school

post.summary: Approve a pending guardian relation request
Reject a pending guardian relation request

get.summary: List a guardian's active children
Get academic progress for a guardian's child
Get aggregate stats for all children of a guardian

get.description: Returns the health status of the API and its dependencies
get.summary: Health check
List materials
Get material by ID

Generate presigned URL for file download
Get statistics for a specific material
Get AI-generated summary for a material

post.summary: Notify that file upload is complete
Generate presigned URL for file upload

get.summary: Get material with all its versions

put.summary: Update or insert progress for a material

get.summary: Get navigation screens
Get screens by resource key
Get a screen by key

put.summary: Save user preferences for a screen

get.summary: Get global statistics
List all attempts for the current user

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and the JWT token. Example: "Bearer eyJhbGci..."
